body:
A professional garage door spring replacement typically takes between **45 minutes to 2.5 hours** for standard residential doors. [How long does it take to make a garage door spring](https://www.wigaragedoorsrepair.com/garage-door-spring-replacement/how-long-does-it-take-to-make-a-garage-door-spring-replacement)[How Long Does It Take to Replace Garage Door Springs?](https://herogaragedoor.com/replace-garage-door-springs-time/)

**Key Timeframe Factors:**

  * **Average Duration:** Most standard torsion spring replacements by a technician take about **1 to 2 hours**.
  * **Fast Replacement:** In some cases, experienced professionals can complete the replacement in as little as **30 to 45 minutes**.
  * **Complex Jobs:** If there is damage to the door, tracks, or cables, or if it is a double-door system with complications, it may take closer to 2.5 hours. [$800 to replace springs? : r/GarageDoorService - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/GarageDoorService/comments/ysfvr1/800_to_replace_springs/)[How Long Does Garage Door Spring Replacement Really Take?](https://ggdoor.com/how-long-does-it-take-to-fix-a-garage-door/)[How long does a garage door spring replacement typically take?](https://www.quora.com/How-long-does-a-garage-door-spring-replacement-typically-take)[How long does it take to make a garage door spring](https://www.wigaragedoorsrepair.com/garage-door-spring-replacement/how-long-does-it-take-to-make-a-garage-door-spring-replacement)[Garage door Spring Repair](https://www.martindoorlv.com/garage-door-repair/)

**What the Process Includes:**

  1. **Assessment & Prep:** 15–30 minutes to evaluate the system and prepare tools.
  2. **Removal & Install:** 15–45 minutes to remove old springs and install new ones.
  3. **Calibration & Testing:** Final adjustments to ensure the door is balanced and operational. [How long does it take to make a garage door spring](https://www.wigaragedoorsrepair.com/garage-door-spring-replacement/how-long-does-it-take-to-make-a-garage-door-spring-replacement)[How Long Does Garage Door Spring Replacement Really Take?](https://ggdoor.com/how-long-does-it-take-to-fix-a-garage-door/)[The Ultimate Guide to Garage Door Springs Repair](https://primosgaragedoors.com/garage-door-springs-repair-guide/)[Garage Door Spring Replacement Services in Wilmington](https://www.overheaddoorwilmington.com/garage-door-services/garage-door-repair/garage-door-spring-replacement/)[Garage Door Spring Repair Burien](https://dansgaragedoorservices.com/locations/garage-door-spring-repair-burien/)

**Factors That Influence Time:**

  * **Type of Spring:** Torsion springs (located above the door) and extension springs (located on the sides) have different installation times.
  * **System Condition:** If other parts, like cables or rollers, need repair, the job will take longer. [How long does a garage door spring replacement typically take?](https://www.quora.com/How-long-does-a-garage-door-spring-replacement-typically-take)[Garage Door Spring Replacement Cost: 2026 Price Guide](https://titangaragedoors.ca/blog/garage-door-spring-replacement-cost/)[Garage Door Spring Repair/Replacement](https://primosgaragedoors.com/garage-door-springs/)[Broken Spring Garage Door Sales, Installation, Service, Garage Door Repair | PolDoor](https://www.poldoor.com/broken-spring-garage-door-repair.php)[Garage Door Spring Repair Cost in Tulsa and OKC (2026)](https://okdiscountgaragedoor.com/garage-door-spring-repair-cost-tulsa-okc)

If you are considering hiring a professional, I can help you find companies in your area or tell you what to look for in a repair quote. Would that be helpful?
